title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6). Active models: Codex, GLM, Copilot fallback. Lane manifest: - `glm-bridge`: reviewer lane - bridge-authoritative GLM verdict on remaining engineering work - `claude-bridge-fallback`: reviewer lane - Claude bridge fallback via Copilot on remaining engineering work - `Locke`: policy lane - current delivery contract and true remaining task - `Schrodinger`: artifact lane - v8 delivery artifacts and user-visible outputs - `James`: critique lane - whether Manus HTML should be reconstructed to PPTX now - `Newton`: flow lane - `selected_variant` / finalize path inspection - `Fermat`: policy lane - whether any engineering task still remains for v8 Council verdict: この note deck の残タスクは、実質 `variant` の選択だけです。今すぐ必要な追加実装はありません。`structured-native` は納品可能で、`nanobanana-manus` は現行契約どおり `PREVIEW_ONLY` の比較用素材です。[variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json) [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json) [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json) 結論としてはこうです。 - `PPTX/PDF` の再構成を今やる必要はありません - 真の残タスクは `selected_variant` を決めることです - `structured-native` を選べばそのまま配布・編集に進めます - `nanobanana-manus` は [slide_1.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/preview-html/slide_1.html) から 28 枚比較できますが、編集用 deck ではありません 実装上も、今のパイプラインは意図的に `selection_required: true`、`selected_variant: null` で止まる仕様です。自動確定コマンドはありません。[run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L563) [test-unit-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L62) fallback_used: true missing_lane: Claude fallback_provider: copilot-cli fallback_reason: `command_failed / bridge fell back to copilot` lane evidence: - Codex lanes: `Locke`, `Schrodinger`, `James`, `Newton`, `Fermat` - GLM lane: `kernel-lane-bridge --provider glm` - Claude fallback lane: `kernel-lane-bridge --provider claude` -> `provider: copilot`
